Transparent Pricing

Fixed fees. No surprises. Cancel anytime.

We believe pricing should be straightforward. Choose a package that fits your business, or let's build a custom solution.

Essentials

£195/month

Perfect for growing businesses with straightforward bookkeeping needs.

  • Daily transaction entry
  • Bank reconciliation
  • Monthly reporting
  • VAT management
  • Email support
  • Xero / QuickBooks integration
Get Started
Most Popular

Professional

£395/month

Our most popular package. Complete accounting for ambitious businesses.

  • Everything in Essentials
  • Management accounts monthly
  • Year-end accounts preparation
  • Tax planning & filing
  • Priority phone support
  • Strategic quarterly reviews
Get Started

Premium+

£595/month

For established businesses needing comprehensive advisory.

  • Everything in Professional
  • Payroll management
  • Company secretarial
  • Advanced tax structuring
  • Dedicated account manager
  • Custom reporting
Get Started

Audit & Assurance

Audit pricing is customized based on company size, complexity, and risk profile. Typical range: £2,500 - £15,000 per year.

Request Audit Quote

Frequently Asked Questions

Can I switch packages?

Yes. You can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel with 30 days notice. No lock-in contracts or penalties.

What's included in setup?

We conduct a free diagnosis call, review your current setup, and handle all integration and migration work at no extra cost.

Do you offer monthly billing?

Yes, all packages are monthly. We also offer 10% discounts for annual prepayment if preferred.

Are there additional fees?

No. Our fees are all-in. There are no hourly charges, filing fees, or surprises. We occasionally recommend specialist support (legal, HR) which you'd contract separately.

Do you offer custom packages?

Absolutely. If our standard packages don't fit perfectly, let's discuss a custom arrangement that works for your business.

What's your commitment period?

There is none. Month-to-month engagement with 30 days notice to cancel. We focus on earning your business continuously.

Why Pay More for Less?

Big Firm Approach

  • High fees (often £800-2000+/month)
  • Slow response times
  • Junior staff on your account
  • Hidden charges and surprises
  • Long contract terms

Greymatter Approach

  • Transparent, fixed fees
  • Same-day response times
  • Senior professionals on your account
  • No hidden charges
  • Month-to-month flexibility

Ready to Get Started?

Let's have a free 15-minute call to discuss which package fits your business.

Book a Free Consultation
